html:
2026-0522
2026-05-29HC, PHACQuarantine ActMinimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order, 2026Minimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order, 2026 in order to establish public health measures to reduce the risk of introduction and spread of Ebola disease in Canada which applies to all travellers who have, in the last 21 days, been in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Uganda or South Sudan, or any other foreign country that is assessed to have a “high” or “very high” risk of outbreak of Ebola disease by Canada’s Minister of Health.N/A
subject: Minimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order, 2026
precis: Minimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order, 2026 in order to establish public health measures to reduce the risk of introduction and spread of Ebola disease in Canada which applies to all travellers who have, in the last 21 days, been in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Uganda or South Sudan, or any other foreign country that is assessed to have a “high” or “very high” risk of outbreak of Ebola disease by Canada’s Minister of Health.
